message:
fix(backup): add spike baseline recovery to prevent permanent export blocking

When spike detection halts an export, HEAD never updates, so the stale
baseline causes every subsequent run to block permanently. Add a spike
baseline file that records counts on halt; if the next run sees a stable
count relative to the baseline, it accepts the new level and proceeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
